title: EQT Corporation: Buy This Dip, Get An +11% Return
text: EQT Corporation has fallen out of favor with investors, as natural gas prices temporarily cooled off. This positively sets up EQT for a meaningful rebound. I make the case that from today's share price, EQT's combined yield in 2023 is on a path to an 11.8% return.

title: Commodity Fundamentals Drive Dividend Strength
text: After years of limited interest in commodity companies, natural gas, oil and copper are now squarely on the radar of active dividend investors, supported by fortified balance sheets and flexible dividend structures. While commodities are highly cyclical, we believe the energy transition and the shift away from reliance on Russian raw materials have improved the secular price outlooks for oil and natural gas.

title: EQT Releases 2021 Environmental, Social and Governance Report
text: Company Makes Substantial Progress on All Emission Reduction Goals While Championing Critical Role of Natural Gas PITTSBURGH , June 22, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- EQT Corporation (NYSE: EQT), the largest producer of natural gas in the United States, today announced the publication of its 2021 Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) Report, highlighting the Company's significant progress in achieving net zero Scope 1 and 2 GHG emissions, as well as its leadership in advocating for natural gas as an affordable, reliable and clean energy source for the U.S. and the world. "In addition to our own positive ESG performance and significant emissions reductions, EQT inserted itself into the global conversation about the critical role natural gas plays in arresting climate change and providing energy security and independence to our allies.

title: LNG Fundamentals Make EQT A Long-Term Buy
text: In this article, I start by explaining why global LNG fundamentals pave the road for a long-term natural gas bull case. EQT is America's largest natural gas producer, with top-quality assets providing high free cash flow and EBITDA growth.

title: Why Natural Gas Stocks Plunged Tuesday
text: Natural gas prices crashed after a major LNG export terminal shut down following a blast.

title: Billionaire Dan Loeb Is Betting Big on These 3 Stocks
text: Dan Loeb is a veteran hedge fund manager and the CEO of Third Point. Let's take a look at his top three positions as of Q1.

title: Why EQT Corporation (EQT) Might be Well Poised for a Surge
text: EQT Corporation (EQT) shares have started gaining and might continue moving higher in the near term, as indicated by solid earnings estimate revisions.
